name: Mixed Olive Relish
recipeIngredient: 2 cups mixed brine cured black and green olives, pitted
1/2 cup drained pimento stuffed green olives (about 3 ounces)
1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice, or to taste
1/3 cup finely chopped fresh flat leafed parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop all the olives and in a bowl toss with onion, oil, lemon juice, and capers.
2. Relish may be prepared up to this point 2 days ahead and chilled, covered.
3. Bring relish to room temperature before serving.
4. Stir in parsley.
Yield: 2 cups
